clues.clue: Thus duck may be seen in Scottish river, indeed!
A new ship? Very much so!
Bolt stand with three legs after first bit has fallen off
A row about fellow taking diamonds or another precious stone
A period of prosperity in which pound is seen to be blossoming
Act to save time, work unit being made clean
A mystical style configured according to a plan
Were indecisive priest and actor miscast?
Pin never to be inserted the wrong way round in end-piece
Awkward staff close to mutiny
Is Parisian classified as “disaffected”?
Show some incredible vitality
Group in home counties — don’t cancel it
Pupil is needed for this crew? Certainly will be in it
French mathematician having love for English design
Your bar set up for party fun?
Insect moving round on the parrot
Spot revolutionary protecting a nasty person
A sort of single person? Not a single person, we hear
Setter intended to fix locks?
“Sunless” periods, as you might surmise?
Team is run to develop great players
Attractive woman guys without maiden sing about on ship
Disguising male in the role of ruler
Son of Harry maybe watches
Greek avenger, old, remains full of energy
Impression created by winsome female’s leaving
One of the oppressive types — those people heartlessly rage
Founder of religious sect recalled you once entertaining theologian
Name of murder victim shortened, one way or another!
